Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class OnePointProcessorRewriting

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.OnePointProcessor<Predicate>
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.OnePointProcessorRewriting
public class OnePointProcessorRewriting extends OnePointProcessor<Predicate>
Handles the processing for rewriting rules SIMP_IN_COMPSET and SIMP_IN_COMPSET_ONEPOINT. The following operations are performed:
  • transforming the input predicate in an appropriate form while memorizing the replacements to make,
  • instantiating the bound identifiers with their corresponding expressions in the predicate.

    private Predicate
    buildQuantifiedFormPredicate(RelationalPredicate replacement, Predicate existingGuard)
     
    QuantifiedPredicate
    getQuantifiedPredicate()
     
    void
    matchAndInstantiate()
     
    private QuantifiedPredicate
    toQuantifiedForm(Predicate predicate)
    Converts the given predicate of the form F ∈ {x · P ∣ E} in a suitable form for the processing to be applied ∃x · E=F' ∧ P, where F' is F pushed inside the quantification for x.
